'''Calabosh-2''' was an astronomical object<ref name="ArmsEquipment" /> located in the [[Calabosh system/Legends|Calabosh system]], a part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Arc d'Stot sector/Legends|Arc d'Stot sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the site of the main headquarters of the weapons manufacturer [[Caliban (manufacturer)/Legends|Caliban]].<ref name="ArmsEquipment" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corman Jeihn]], who hailed from Calabosh-2, was employed with Caliban as a [[Security guard/Legends|security guard]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Insider" />

Since Caliban's marketing plan was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the [[Imperial Military/Legends|armed forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] soon arrived at the company's headquarters at Calabosh-2.<ref name="ArmsEquipment" /> After Caliban was nationalized by [[Imperial Munitions/Legends|Imperial Munitions]]<ref name="Insider" /> at some point by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{InsiderCite|148|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Cloud City Wing Guards}} states [[Corman Jeihn]] moved to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and became a member of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]] after [[Caliban (manufacturer)/Legends|Caliban]] was nationalized by [[Imperial Munitions/Legends|Imperial Munitions]]. "Rogues Gallery" also depicts Jeihn serving in the ranks of the Wing Guard during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Therefore, Caliban must have been nationalized at some point by 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> Jeihn moved to<ref name="Insider" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], where he eventually became a member of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security force]].<ref name="Insider" />

==Behind the scenes==
Calabosh-2 was first mentioned in the [[2002]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebook ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'', which was authored by [[Jeff Grubb]] and [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="ArmsEquipment" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Calabosh [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Calabosh-2, in grid square K-15.<ref name="EAOC" />
